# Setup Script Template

Use this as a scaffold to generate `new-mac-setup.sh` based on the Phase 1 audit.
Only include sections for tools actually detected on the old Mac.

```bash
#!/bin/zsh
# =============================================================================
# New Mac Setup Script
# Generated by /mac-migration
# Run this on the NEW Mac
# =============================================================================

set -e

echo "=============================="
echo " New Mac Setup"
echo "=============================="

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. HOMEBREW
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
echo "\n[1] Installing Homebrew..."
if ! command -v brew &>/dev/null; then
  /bin/bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://brew.sh/install.sh)"
fi
eval "$(/opt/homebrew/bin/brew shellenv)"

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. HOMEBREW TAPS (add only taps detected on old Mac)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
echo "\n[2] Adding taps..."
# brew tap mongodb/brew
# brew tap facebook/fb
# brew tap wix/brew
# brew tap shivammathur/php
# brew tap stripe/stripe-cli
# brew tap redis-stack/redis-stack

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. HOMEBREW PACKAGES (add detected packages from brew leaves)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
echo "\n[3] Installing packages..."
brew install \
  # ADD DETECTED PACKAGES HERE
  git \
  curl \
  wget

# Casks (GUI apps to install fresh)
brew install --cask \
  # ADD DETECTED CASKS HERE

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. NODE (only if nvm detected)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
echo "\n[4] Installing nvm and Node..."
if [ ! -d "$HOME/.nvm" ]; then
  curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.40.0/install.sh | bash
fi
export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"
[ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"

# ADD DETECTED NODE VERSIONS:
# nvm install 20
# nvm install 22
# nvm use 22
# nvm alias default 22

# Global npm packages
# npm install -g yarn grunt-cli corepack

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. PYTHON (only if pyenv detected)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
echo "\n[5] Installing pyenv and Python..."
if ! command -v pyenv &>/dev/null; then
  brew install pyenv pyenv-virtualenv
fi
export PATH="$HOME/.pyenv/bin:$PATH"
eval "$(pyenv init -)"

# ADD DETECTED PYTHON VERSIONS:
# pyenv install 3.11.11
# pyenv install 3.12.8
# pyenv global 3.11.11

# Global pip packages
# pip install numpy requests

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6. RUBY (only if rbenv detected)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
echo "\n[6] Installing rbenv and Ruby..."
# if ! command -v rbenv &>/dev/null; then
#   brew install rbenv ruby-build
# fi
# ADD DETECTED RUBY VERSIONS:
# rbenv install 3.2.0
# rbenv global 3.2.0

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 7. PHP (only if PHP detected — use shivammathur tap for older versions)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
echo "\n[7] Installing PHP..."
# brew install shivammathur/php/php@8.2
# brew install shivammathur/php/php@7.4

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 8. GO (only if Go detected)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# brew install go

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 9. RUST (only if Rust detected)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 10. JAVA (only if Java detected)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# brew install openjdk
# brew install openjdk@17
# brew install openjdk@11

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 11. OTHER LANGUAGES (add as detected)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# brew install elixir
# brew install flutter
# brew install kotlin

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 12. DATABASES — start services
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
echo "\n[12] Starting services..."
# brew services start postgresql@16
# brew services start mysql
# brew services start mongodb/brew/mongodb-community
# brew services start redis
# brew services start rabbitmq

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 13. WRITE .zshrc (generate based on detected tools with new username paths)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
echo "\n[13] Writing .zshrc..."
cat > "$HOME/.zshrc" << 'ZSHRC'
# Shell framework (oh-my-zsh or starship etc.)
export ZSH="$HOME/.oh-my-zsh"
ZSH_THEME="robbyrussell"
plugins=(git)
source $ZSH/oh-my-zsh.sh

# Homebrew
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/sbin:$PATH"

# ADD TOOL-SPECIFIC PATH ENTRIES HERE BASED ON WHAT WAS DETECTED
# They should use $HOME instead of hardcoded /Users/username

# NVM (lazy loaded)
export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"
node() { unset -f node npm npx nvm && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && source "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && node "$@"; }
npm()  { unset -f node npm npx nvm && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && source "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && npm "$@"; }
npx()  { unset -f node npm npx nvm && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && source "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && npx "$@"; }
nvm()  { unset -f node npm npx nvm && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && source "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm "$@"; }

# pyenv (lazy loaded)
export PATH="$HOME/.pyenv/bin:$PATH"
python()  { unset -f python python3 pip pip3 pyenv && eval "$(pyenv init -)" && eval "$(pyenv init --path)" && python "$@"; }
python3() { unset -f python python3 pip pip3 pyenv && eval "$(pyenv init -)" && eval "$(pyenv init --path)" && python3 "$@"; }
pip()     { unset -f python python3 pip pip3 pyenv && eval "$(pyenv init -)" && eval "$(pyenv init --path)" && pip "$@"; }
pip3()    { unset -f python python3 pip pip3 pyenv && eval "$(pyenv init -)" && eval "$(pyenv init --path)" && pip3 "$@"; }
pyenv()   { unset -f python python3 pip pip3 pyenv && eval "$(pyenv init -)" && eval "$(pyenv init --path)" && pyenv "$@"; }

# Local bin
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"

# Bun
export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun"
export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH"
[ -s "$HOME/.bun/_bun" ] && source "$HOME/.bun/_bun"

ZSHRC

echo "\n=============================="
echo " Setup complete! Run: source ~/.zshrc"
echo "=============================="
```
